home.title: Data that backs product decisions.
home.subtitle: Senior Product Analytics at Grupo Boticário. I move comfortably between data engineering and development, from the pipeline in BigQuery to the dashboard the product team opens every day.

spotlights.title: Grupo Boticário
spotlights.description: I structure indicators and data solutions for product teams. I maintain an internal DataHub used by analysts and managers.

spotlights.eyebrow: // what I build on the side
spotlights.title: Youtube Channel
spotlights.description: Technical data engineering courses, from zero to advanced — teaching reasoning, not just tools.

stack.title: Working stack
stack.description: I prefer mature tools with a good community that solve the problem in a simple way. The list changes over time, but the criteria stay the same.

groups.title: Platform & data
groups.description: Governance, automation and observability so data arrives clean and on time.

groups.title: Software & product
groups.description: APIs, services and web interfaces built with a focus on performance, simple maintenance and frequent delivery.

principles.title: Quality as foundation
principles.text: Tests, validation and reliable data from the start. Without quality, scale is an illusion.

principles.title: Pragmatic architecture
principles.text: Simple, sustainable, evolving solutions. Complexity only when it adds clarity or impact.

principles.title: Sustainable pace
principles.text: Short cycles, constant alignment, and a focus on removing friction between engineering, product and business.

sobre.title: I move comfortably between data and software.
sobre.subtitle: Background in data engineering and development (Node.js, Next.js, React, TypeScript). I've worked in consultancies, startups and large companies, today I help product teams decide based on real data.
sobre.roleLine: Senior Product Analytics, mentor and developer

timeline.text: I work alongside product teams to structure metrics and the data solutions behind them. I maintain an internal DataHub used by analysts and managers.
highlights: Stack: BigQuery, SQL, JavaScript, Power BI

timeline.text: Interim leadership of the Data & BI team, focused on data governance, pipeline standardization and refactoring legacy scripts.
End-to-end development of a marketing campaign dashboard for a product with $60M ARR.
highlights: Data quality MVP for the platform core using Great Expectations
Stack: SQL, Python, Spark, Databricks, Power BI

timeline.text: Go-to data resource for the sales team, teaching them to read their own numbers. Redesigned reporting for the company's largest client, contributing to a multi-year renewal.
highlights: ROI study that prevented churn and drove a 20% upsell

timeline.text: Co-founder and Data Lead at my own startup, data analyst and customer success at Anymarket, key account at aiqfome, and co-founder of an early-stage startup.

sobre.freelanceNote: Freelancing since Oct/2019: building and maintaining landing pages and SPAs in Next.js, Node and React, alongside the roles above.

principles.title: Data as a product
principles.text: Data has an owner, a contract and a purpose. Governance is a consequence of good practices, not bureaucracy.

principles.title: Software that solves things
principles.text: Clean code is a means, not an end. The goal is to ship useful, measurable, sustainable solutions.

principles.title: Teams that learn
principles.text: Healthy environments prioritize clarity, autonomy and continuous learning.

sobre.contactTitle: Want to talk about career or mentorship?
sobre.contactText: I'm open to talking about product data, data engineering or career transitions. Send me a message and let's set up a remote coffee chat.

projetos.title: Projects that mix data, software and product thinking.
projetos.subtitle: What I'm building and maintaining today. Only public repositories.

featured.description: Structuring metrics and data solutions for product teams. Maintaining an internal DataHub used by analysts and managers.

featured.title: Sergio Junqueira - Data & Tech
featured.description: A channel focused on data engineering, analytics, and development. The goal is to show the day-to-day work, solving real architectural problems and building pipelines without the fluff.

featured.title: Dragenda
featured.description: A full-stack clinic management app. Built as a React and Next study project. Has a few bugs, no timeline for fixes.

projetos.reposSubtitle: Proofs of concept, refactors and tools I keep open.
projetos.contactTitle: Got a challenge worth thinking through together?
projetos.contactText: I enjoy problems that need a systems view: consistent data, reliable software and aligned people.

blog.title: I write about data, software and product.
blog.subtitle: Short posts, focused on learning and applicability. No fluff, no clickbait.
blog.description: All the latest articles on algorithms, data structures, and tech careers, straight from the source.

article.authorDescription: I write about Data Engineering, Software Engineering, architecture, algorithms, and career, always focusing on technical content and real-world applications.

turingLabs.title: Sergio Junqueira - Data & Tech
turingLabs.subtitle: Videos on data and software engineering focusing on how real systems are built, scaled, and maintained in production.
turingLabs.aboutP1: The Turing Labs channel focuses on software engineering and especially data engineering in practice, going beyond superficial tutorials. The idea is to show how real systems are designed, from architectural decisions to implementation and technical trade-offs.
turingLabs.aboutP2: The content is aimed at those who want to understand real engineering: how pipelines are structured, how APIs are designed for scale, how databases behave under load, and what decisions make a difference in production. In short, that's basically it.

topics.title: Data Engineering
topics.description: Data modeling, pipelines, ETL/ELT, BigQuery, orchestration, and data architecture in production.

topics.title: Software Engineering
topics.description: Building APIs, backend systems, TypeScript, Node.js, clean architecture, and software design decisions.

topics.title: Systems in Production
topics.description: How real applications work: scalability, performance, observability, queues, caching, and databases.

turingLabs.ctaText: The first videos are currently being planned. If you want to follow along or suggest topics, get in touch.
